user.title: Connect to RadiusStack-HA
user.description: Enter your RadiusStack server details. Generate an API key in the RadiusStack web UI under Administrators.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP of the RadiusStack API server
data_description.api_key: X-API-Key value from the Admins page
data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch data in seconds (minimum 5)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check host, port and that the API is reachable
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key — check the key in the Admins page
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs

abort.already_configured: This RadiusStack-HA server is already configured

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect with the new settings
